calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Apr-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Petitioners' Motion for Attorneys' Fees.

Appearances: Mark Epstein, Seiler, Epstein, Zeigler, & Applegate 415-979-0500
No appearance by Defendant. Matter unopposed.
GRANTED. Attorneys fees granted in the amount of $10,840.00. Petitioners are the prevailing party having recovered greater relief in the instant action. (Civ. Code, 1717.) Defendants failed to show existence of an agreement waiving attorneys' fees.

The Court signs and files Order in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: R. Goulding; Dept.501; Not Reported

Notice Of Hearing Re Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Epstein, Esq. of Seller Epstein Ziegler & Applegate, LLP (415-979-0500) for Petitioner and moving party John Sollner.
Reginald Hindley, Esq. (415-608-4500) Respondent and opposing party in Pro Per.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER JOHN SOLLNER and SAMETC, LLC.'s Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration is taken under submission. Plaintiff submits 2 proposed orders. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
